mapper.select: SELECT * FROM resume WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT * FROM resume WHERE share_code = #{shareCode} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM resume WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND user_id = #{userId}
AND ( name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR full_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR position LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR profile LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT * FROM resume WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY view_count DESC, updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
